fields.calculatedFormula: IF( Data_Quality_Score__c =100, "Key Event/Task Details Captured","Missing: "&IF( LEN( Subject ) < 3,"Quality Subject Description, ","")&""&IF(LEN(WhoId)=0,"Contact/Lead Reference, ","")&""&IF(LEN(WhatId)=0,"Account/Opportunity Reference",""))
fields.label: Data Quality Description
fields.name: Data_Quality_Description__c

fields.calculatedFormula: IF( LEN(  Subject  ) < 3, 0,30) + IF( LEN(  WhoId ) = 0, 0,40) + IF( LEN(  WhatId ) = 0, 0,30)
fields.label: Data Quality Score
fields.name: Data_Quality_Score__c

fields.calculatedFormula: IF(CONTAINS( Subject , "Email"), "Email", IF(CONTAINS( Subject , "Cold Call"), "Cold Call", IF(CONTAINS( Subject , "Call"), "Call", IF(CONTAINS( Subject , "Meeting"), "Meeting", IF(CONTAINS( Subject , "On Site Visit"), "Site Visit", IF(CONTAINS( Subject , "Quote"), "Send Letter/Quote", "Other"))))))
